summary: Iteration 159: SQLite migration testing for Desktop App and Local Server. All SQLite database functionality verified - initialization, CRUD operations, persistence, JSON migration, backup/restore. Web backend and frontend working correctly. Two bug fixes in main.js verified: (1) dbEngine globally scoped at line 68, (2) hemali integrity check uses database.data.cash_transactions.push() instead of col().
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Desktop sqlite-database.js - All 16 tests passed (initialization, getData, push, addEntry, updateEntry, deleteEntry, bulkDeleteEntries, exportToJson, importFromJson, milling CRUD, getMillingSummary, close)
PASS: Local-server sqlite-database.js - All 7 tests passed (identical API surface to desktop)
PASS: Persistence test - Data survives close and re-open
PASS: JSON migration test - Auto-migration from existing JSON file works
PASS: Bug fix 1 - dbEngine is globally scoped at line 68 (not inside startApplication)
PASS: Bug fix 2 - hemali integrity check uses database.data.cash_transactions.push() at lines 1330-1341 (not col())
PASS: Web backend /api/auth/login returns 200 with correct response
PASS: Web backend /api/entries returns entries array with pagination

success_rate.backend: 100% - Web API working, SQLite tests 96% (24/25 passed, 1 minor timing issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: SQLite migration complete for Desktop App and Local Server. Both use better-sqlite3 with WAL mode. The sqlite-database.js provides drop-in replacement for JsonDatabase with identical API surface. Web backend (Python/MongoDB) was NOT changed. Serial ports for weighbridge/cameras are MOCKED.

desktop_sqlite_database.initialization: PASS - Creates DB file with WAL mode
desktop_sqlite_database.getData_settings: PASS - Returns empty object for fresh DB
desktop_sqlite_database.push_settings: PASS - Saves and retrieves settings correctly
desktop_sqlite_database.addEntry: PASS - Creates entry with calculated fields and linked cash_transactions
desktop_sqlite_database.updateEntry: PASS - Recalculates fields and recreates linked records
desktop_sqlite_database.deleteEntry: PASS - Removes entry and all linked cash/diesel/gunny records
desktop_sqlite_database.bulkDeleteEntries: PASS - Removes multiple entries and linked records
desktop_sqlite_database.exportToJson: PASS - Returns valid JSON string of all data
desktop_sqlite_database.importFromJson: PASS - Restores data from JSON string
desktop_sqlite_database.milling_CRUD: PASS - getMillingEntries, createMillingEntry, updateMillingEntry, deleteMillingEntry all work

features_tested.persistence: PASS - Data survives close and re-open
features_tested.json_migration: PASS - Auto-migration from existing JSON file works

web_frontend.login_page: PASS - Loads correctly with username/password fields
web_frontend.main_app: PASS - All 12+ tabs visible, Total Summary card, Mill Entries table
